data.name: TR-PICUS-LATERAL-001: DCOM/COM Object Abuse (MMC20Application, CheeseDCOM)
data.description: Detects suspicious COM object instantiation for lateral movement. Monitors for CheeseDCOM, MMC20Application, and other COM-based RCE techniques. These are common DCOM abuse patterns used for lateral movement without command-line artifacts. MITRE T1021.003.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'pwsh.exe' OR process.name contains 'cscript.exe' OR process.name contains 'wscript.exe') AND (process.command_line contains 'MMC20Application' OR process.command_line contains 'CheeseDCOM' OR process.command_line contains 'ShellBrowserWindow' OR process.command_line contains 'CreateObject' AND process.command_line contains 'WinRM') AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\')

techniques.name: Remote Services: Distributed Component Object Model
